name: Aspirin
storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C
uses: Pain relief, fever reduction, prevention of blood clots
side_effects: Gastrointestinal irritation, bleeding risk, allergic reactions

name: Paracetamol
side_effects: Liver toxicity in overdose, rare allergic reactions

name: Amoxicillin
uses: Treatment of bacterial infections (respiratory, urinary, skin)

name: Ibuprofen
uses: Pain relief, inflammation reduction, fever reduction
side_effects: Gastrointestinal irritation, kidney effects, increased bleeding risk
